description.value: You generate an overwhelming surge of electricity from within your body, engulfing yourself in a storm of sparks that causes nearby tech to malfunction. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Overload Systems] as a 7th-rank arcane innate spell once per hour. Raxilites and raxilite technology are immune to this spell, and you can choose up to four squares to exclude from the area of the spell.
